tests: multi-platform Tauri cargo test and build jobs
repository required CI, Security, Tri-App, Main Verification, and Release Policy checks
risk_notes: Global Node ambient types can hide browser/WebView runtime errors.
TypeScript 6 changes compiler behavior and may expose stricter library declarations.
Desktop frontend and Node test environments must remain independently type-checked.
rollback_steps: Restore package.json, package-lock.json, and TypeScript configs from the parent main commit.
Run npm ci, npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run build, and Tauri multi-platform checks before redeployment.
validation_boundary: GitHub required checks on the pull-request head are authoritative and fail closed.
